implementation_summary: Cleaned up tests/test_apply_changes.py by making the _already_applied test deterministic with explicit inline file setup and stable assertions on unchanged file contents and empty results. Removed the leftover hacky assertion pattern without touching out-of-scope files, and verified the full test file passes.
